overall.description: A stationary shot of a dimly lit underground potions classroom from a video game, featuring stone vaulted ceilings, wooden worktables, and students in dark robes periodically walking through the chamber while the player character works at a cauldron in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground potions classroom with vaulted stone ceilings

student walks through the center of the room heading left
two students walk together from right to left through the chamber

large stone archways forming doorways at the far end of the room
long wooden tables with stools arranged in rows for potion-making

warm glowing lanterns suspended from the ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: A static view of a dimly lit underground potions classroom with vaulted stone ceilings and arches. The player character stands at a worktable in the foreground tending to a glowing green cauldron, while other students periodically walk through the chamber from right to left. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone walls and wooden worktables arranged throughout the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a dimly lit underground potions classroom where the stillness of the stone architecture contrasts with the subtle movement of students. It begins with a focus on the player character in the foreground, who tends to a glowing green cauldron atop a wooden worktable. As the scene unfolds, the warm lantern light casts soft glows across the vaulted stone ceilings and arches, highlighting the depth of the chamber. The composition remains fixed as students in dark robes periodically drift through the background from right to left, weaving between the arranged worktables before disappearing into the shadows of the hall.
